//: Lighthouse CI config. We sell accessibility, so the a11y category is a HARD 1.0 gate. Other categories are warn-level budgets so a transient perf dip never blocks a merge — tighten to 'error' as the site stabilizes.

collect.//: Runs against a local production build (next build && next start) started by the workflow on port 3000. Two public routes: landing + scanner funnel.

upload.//: Free temporary public storage hosted by the LHCI project — no token/server required. Reports are kept for ~7 days and linked in the job log.
